title: RubyRadiance
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that introduces magical ruby-based content, tools, and mystical mechanics to enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
Ruby Radiance
A Minecraft Fabric mod that introduces magical ruby-based content, tools, and mystical mechanics to enhance your Minecraft experience.

✨ Features
🔮 Core Materials
Ethernal Ruby

A stronger, upgraded version of the regular ruby
Core material for crafting advanced tools and armor
Essential component for magical crafting recipes
Ethernal Ruby Block

Compact storage for Ethernal Rubies
Decorative block with a beautiful shimmering appearance
Used in advanced crafting recipes
🪄 Magic Items
Ruby Wand

Recipe: 2 Rubies + 1 Diamond + 1 Stick
Ability: Right-click a normal emerald block to transform it into an Ethernal Ruby Block
Provides an interactive upgrade mechanic for ruby blocks
Magic Block

Ability: Converts emeralds thrown onto it into Ethernal Rubies
Adds a mystical, automated element to ruby upgrading
Features beautiful amethyst-like sounds
🍎 Food Items
Ruby Apple

Grants the Luck effect when consumed
Ties perfectly into the mod's ruby theme
Provides valuable gameplay benefits
Blueberries

A fun nod to the Minecraft trailer cameo that never made it into the game
Adds more plant variety to the world
Enriches the natural environment
⚔️ Ruby Tools
Complete tool set crafted from Ethernal Rubies:

Ruby Sword: Enhanced combat weapon with high damage
Ruby Pickaxe: Superior mining tool for fast resource gathering
Ruby Axe: Efficient woodcutting tool
Ruby Shovel: Advanced digging implement
Ruby Hoe: Magical farming tool
All tools feature:

Increased durability compared to standard materials
Enhanced mining/attack speed
Beautiful ruby-themed textures
High enchantability for magical enhancements
🎮 Gameplay Progression
Early Game: Collect regular emeralds from mining or trading
Mid Game: Use the Ruby Wand or Magic Block to create Ethernal Rubies
Advanced: Craft powerful ruby tools and build with Ethernal Ruby Blocks
Endgame: Utilize the full magical ecosystem for enhanced gameplay
🛠️ Technical Details
Minecraft Version: 1.21.1
Mod Loader: Fabric
Dependencies: Fabric API
